text-xs.$description: Type scale — rem, derived from a 14px root.

leading-none.$description: Line-height 1 — deliberate for icon and single-glyph alignment, where any leading misaligns the box. Named so it is visibly a choice rather than a magic literal.

sp-none.$description: Explicit zero spacing. Not a lever — nobody re-points this at a non-zero value. It exists so the spacing properties can be linted absolutely: every padding/margin/gap states a token, so a bare literal is always a violation with no carve-out to slip through. NOTE: sp-0 below is 2px, not zero.

radius-full.$description: Circle/pill. Not a length: it tracks the box at any size, so it states the intent (round this completely) that a px radius cannot. Used for avatars, status dots and icon buttons.

z-raised.$description: Sticky table headers, resize handles, lifecycle dots — lifted just off the base within their own scroller.

z-pinned.$description: Pinned table column cells, above sticky headers of the same table.

z-pinned-header.$description: The pinned-column header corner, which must sit above both.

z-dropdown.$description: Attached menus and inline edit overlays.

z-overlay.$description: Local (in-pane) overlays. NOTE: below z-menu and z-tooltip — the project-detail modal overlay lives here while the app modal is at z-modal, which is a pre-existing inconsistency this naming makes visible rather than fixes.

z-menu.$description: Filter-bar and other detached menu panels.

z-popover.$description: Guidance popups, session popovers, file popups.

z-modal.$description: Modal surface — one above its own backdrop.

z-search-overlay.$description: Target-search positioner, above the modal it can be opened from.

z-palette.$description: Command palette — one above its own backdrop.

z-toast.$description: Toasts: always last, above everything including dev overlays.

border-w.$description: Hairline border. Used 202 times across the app, so it is a system decision, not per-component geometry: one value to change if the UI ever moves off a 1px rule.

border-w-thick.$description: Emphasis border (selected/active edges). The lone 1.5px in the tree was drift and is folded into this.
